Hi,

We’re updating our Revolut Securities Europe UAB Trading Terms, as we now offer Exchange-Traded Notes (ETNs) and Exchange-Traded Commodities (ETCs). These changes will be effective from February 13, 2026.

What's changing?
We've made the following updates to reflect the addition of ETNs and ETCs and a small update relating to limit orders:

In Section 1, we introduced references to ETNs and ETCs. Together with Exchange Traded Funds, these instruments are now collectively referred to as Exchange-Traded Products (ETPs).

In Section 18, we clarified that ETNs and ETCs are not eligible for inclusion in the ETFs investment plan. We have also updated the "Limit orders" sub-section to reflect your instruction that, if a limit order is not executed immediately, it should not be made public. This does not affect how we execute your limit orders or how we seek the best available price for you.

In Section 21, we clarified that we act as an agent when executing orders for ETNs and ETCs. For more information on how we execute your orders in ETNs and ETCs, refer to our Order Handling and Best Execution Policy.

In Section 39 and the Fee Schedule, we updated the terms to reflect pricing for ETNs and ETCs. Pricing for existing instruments remains unchanged. For full cost details of ETNs and ETCs, refer to the respective Ex-Ante Costs & Charges Disclosure.

For important information regarding the risks associated with transactions in ETNs and ETCs, see Section III of our Description of Services, Financial Instruments and Risks.

What do I need to do?
The new Trading Terms will take effect on February 13, 2026. If you’re happy with these changes, you don't need to do anything. If for any reason you're not comfortable or don't agree with these updates, you can close your account and end your contract with us for free in the app.

Review the updated Trading Terms in the attached document, or tap "Check updated terms" below. You can review and download previous versions of our Trading Terms any time in the History section at the top of the document.

Check updated terms
— Team Revolut

Investment services are provided by Revolut Securities Europe UAB, represented in Switzerland by Revolut (Switzerland) AG. Information contained herein is not a personal recommendation, investment advice or offer to take any investment decision, therefore you must carefully consider your financial situation, review relevant documents and information or seek professional independent advice before entering into financial transactions or signing up for new investment services.

The value of investments can go up as well as down, and you may receive less than your original investment or lose the value of your entire initial investment. Past performance and forecasts are not a reliable indicator of future results. Currency rate fluctuations can adversely impact the overall returns on your original investment. Further information can be found in our Risk Disclosure and Invest FAQ.

Subject: Follow-up from IEEE BigData 2025 – Continue Networking on Whova
Body:
Hi,

We hope you had a great time at The 13th IEEE International Conference on Big Data (IEEE BigData 2025).

We’ve received a few common questions from attendees and wanted to share the answers:

1) Can I continue to use the Whova app to keep in touch with fellow attendees?
Yes. You can follow up with people you met (or didn’t get to meet) through in-app messages, e-business card requests, and Community posts.

2) What else can I do with the app now that the event is over?
You can receive updates about future events from organizers. Many events worldwide use Whova, so you can keep the app as a central place to manage your event networking activities.

3) How long will the event information remain available?
Event information (such as the agenda) will remain accessible for 3 months, or longer upon the organizer’s request. Your contacts, messages, and scanned cards will not be removed.

Whova Team

This message was sent through Whova. Your email address and contact information are not disclosed to the sender. You may turn off these emails at any time or visit the Whova FAQ page for more information.

Subject: ESTA Status Change
Body:
There has been an update to your ESTA Travel Authorization Status submitted on February 07, 2025. Please visit https://esta.cbp.dhs.gov/esta to check your application.

Arriving via a Land Border?

An I-94 is required for all ESTA approved applicants visiting or transiting the U.S. Travelers will be issued an electronic I-94 during the admission process and a $6 processing fee will be charged at a land port of entry.

The I-94 website and CBP One mobile application allow you to apply in advance, saving you time at the port of entry, by capturing your destination information and allowing you to prepay using the payment type of your choice, including credit card or digital wallet.

The I-94 website and CBP One mobile application also allow travelers to check the status of their admission to the United States and send alerts if the status is nearing expiration.

Website:
https://i94.cbp.dhs.gov

ESTA Program Office:
https://esta.cbp.dhs.gov/esta
https://www.cbp.gov/esta

E-mail Security: If you are concerned about clicking the link, ESTA can be accessed by typing https://esta.cbp.dhs.gov in the address bar of your browser.

Subject: Information on the availability of SYNLAB Hungary Kft. GenePlanet test results
Body:
Dear Partner,

We are pleased to inform you that your sample is on its way to the laboratory. The results will be uploaded to the GenePlanet app or to your personal profile created on the website within 6–8 weeks. You will receive an email notification once they are ready.

If you have not yet registered your sample, please do so, as the laboratory will not begin processing without registration.

Registration steps:
1. Download the GenePlanet app or visit https://app.geneplanet.com/dna
2. Create an account by entering your personal details.
3. Activate the test using the barcode and security code found in the sample box.
4. Within 6–8 weeks after activation, your personalized results will be automatically uploaded to your profile in the app or on the website.

For more details, visit the SYNLAB webshop: https://synlab.hu/dns-univerzum/

If you have questions about the product or encounter technical difficulties, please contact customer service at ugyfelszolgalat@synlab.com

Thank you for choosing SYNLAB as your healthcare provider.
